title: How many Fed rate cuts in 2026?
description: This market will resolve according to the exact amount of cuts of 25 basis points in 2026 by the Fed.

markets.question: Will no Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
markets.description: This market will resolve according to the exact amount of cuts of 25 basis points in 2026 by the Fed. The resolution source will be FOMC statements.

title: US recession by end of 2026?
description: This market will resolve to Yes if the US enters recession by end of 2026.

markets.question: US recession by end of 2026?
markets.description: This market will resolve to Yes if the US enters recession by end of 2026. The resolution source will be official announcements from the NBER and BEA.

title: Will China invade Taiwan by end of 2026?
description: This market will resolve to Yes if China commences a military offensive intended to establish control over Taiwan by December 31, 2026.

markets.question: Will China invade Taiwan by end of 2026?
markets.description: This market will resolve to Yes if China commences a military offensive intended to establish control over Taiwan by December 31, 2026.

title: US national Bitcoin reserve before 2027?
description: This market will resolve to Yes if the US establishes a national Bitcoin reserve before 2027.

markets.question: US national Bitcoin reserve before 2027?
markets.description: This market will resolve to Yes if the US establishes a national Bitcoin reserve before 2027.
